title: On the Death of Eusebius Pamphilus, Acacius succeeds to the Bishopric of Cæsarea.

source.title: NPNF2-02. Socrates and Sozomenus Ecclesiastical Histories

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: At this time Eusebius, who was bishop of Cæsarea in Palestine, and had the surname of Pamphilus, having died, Acacius, his disciple, succeeded him in the bishopric.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: This individual published several books, and among others a biographical sketch of his master.
